title: hedera viridis
intro: Hedera viridis, also known as the English ivy, is a type of evergreen climbing plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hedera viridis include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hedera viridis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
